message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as ユーザ
participant Browser as ブラウザ
participant web.php as web.php
participant Controller as Kouka2_1Controller
participant Restdata as Restdata
participant index.blade.php as index.blade.php
participant show.blade.php as show.blade.php

Actor ユーザ -- Browser : 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka2_1]
Browser -- web.php : GET[/kouka2_1]
web.php -- Kouka2_1Controller : @index
Kouka2_1Controller -- Restdata : all()
Kouka2_1Controller -- index.blade.php : (HTML)
Kouka2_1Controller -- show.blade.php : (HTML)

Actor ユーザ -- Browser : 検索ボタンを押下
Browser -- web.php : GET[/kouka2_1/find]
web.php -- Kouka2_1Controller : @find
Kouka2_1Controller -- Restdata : where()->first()
Kouka2_1Controller -- index.blade.php : (HTML)
Kouka2_1Controller -- show.blade.php : (HTML)

@enduml
